description: total_usage: range(len(events) - 1) skips the last event, undercounting usage
page_count: floor division drops the final partial page (needs ceiling)
token_from_header: auth.split(" ")[1] raises IndexError on a missing/malformed Authorization header
average_latency_ms: ZeroDivisionError when samples is empty
flush_pending: bare except swallows insert failures, silently dropping queued events
ship: on URLError the except only logs, then resp.read() hits an unbound resp (NameError)
events_for_tenant: early return on empty rows skips conn.close(), leaking the sqlite connection
config_for: unlocked check-then-act on the shared _configs dict (self._lock is never used)
events_for_tenant: tenant/since interpolated into SQL via f-string — SQL injection
check_api_token: MD5 used to digest API tokens (broken hash for a credential)
summarize: print() for the unknown-kind warning instead of the module logger
amount_to_cents: int(amount * 100) truncates float error, e.g. 19.99 becomes 1998 cents
